hero.subtitle: We build custom automations that connect your apps, handle repetitive tasks, and run your business in the background — 24/7, without human error.

whatIsAutomation.title: Your Business on Autopilot
whatIsAutomation.subtitle: Workflow automation means connecting your apps and tools so they talk to each other and complete tasks automatically — no manual work needed.
whatIsAutomation.analogy: Think of it like hiring an invisible employee who works 24/7, never makes mistakes, costs almost nothing, and handles all your boring repetitive tasks — instantly.

before.title: Without Automation
items: Manually copy-pasting data between apps every day
Forgetting to follow up with leads
Spending hours on reports you could generate in seconds
Missing important notifications while you sleep
Doing the same 10 steps every time an order comes in
Your team wasting time on tasks a computer could do

after.title: With Automation
items: Data flows automatically between all your apps
Follow-ups sent instantly without you lifting a finger
Reports generated and delivered on schedule
Get notified on WhatsApp the moment something important happens
Orders processed, confirmed, and tracked automatically
Your team focused on work that actually needs humans

whoIsThisFor.title: If You Recognize Yourself Here, You Need This

toolsIntegrations.title: We Connect the Apps You Already Use
toolsIntegrations.subtitle: No need to switch tools or change how you work. We build automations around your existing stack.
toolsIntegrations.tagline: If it has an API, we can automate it
toolsIntegrations.ctaText: Using a tool not on the list? We can almost certainly still integrate it.

howItWorks.title: From First Call to Live Automation in Days
howItWorks.subtitle: No long meetings, no confusing jargon. Just a simple process that gets you from "I have a problem" to "it's running automatically" as fast as possible.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We start with a free 30-minute call. You tell us what's eating your time — we'll figure out exactly what needs to be automated and how.
details: What tasks take the most time?
Which tools do you currently use?

steps.title: We Map It Out
steps.description: We design the full automation flow — every trigger, condition, and action — and share it with you for approval before we write a single line.

steps.title: We Build & Test
steps.description: We build the automation in our environment, run it through real test scenarios, and fix any edge cases before showing it to you.

steps.title: Go Live & Handover
steps.description: We deploy everything to your account, walk you through how it works, and hand over full documentation. Plus 30 days of free support.

howItWorks.timelineTitle: Most Automations Are Live Within 7 Days
howItWorks.timelineText: Simple automations (1–2 steps) can be live within 24–48 hours. Complex multi-step workflows typically take 5–7 days. We'll give you an exact timeline after the discovery call.

pricing.title: Straightforward Prices, No Surprises
pricing.subtitle: Every plan includes a one-time setup fee and optional monthly maintenance. No hidden charges.
pricing.valueNote: 💡 Cheaper than hiring one employee for a single week

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.description: Perfect for individuals and small businesses who need 1–2 automations to save time on a specific task.

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.description: For growing businesses who want a connected set of workflows that automate their core operations end-to-end.

tiers.name: Custom
tiers.description: For agencies and businesses that need a full automation ecosystem — complex logic, custom integrations, and ongoing management.

faqs.a: Monitoring, fixing broken automations, small updates, and keeping your workflows running as connected apps change their APIs.

faqs.q: Do I pay per month or just once?
faqs.a: You pay a one-time setup fee to build your automation. Monthly maintenance is completely optional — only needed if you want ongoing monitoring.

faqs.q: What if I need more automations later?
faqs.a: You can add more workflows at any time. Each new automation is priced based on complexity, usually starting from ৳4,000.

faqs.q: Can I see it working before I pay in full?
faqs.a: Yes. We build on a staging environment and you test it live before we ask for the final 50% payment.

faq.title: Everything You Want to Know
faq.subtitle: Honest answers to the questions we hear most often from clients before they get started.

questions.question: Do I need any technical knowledge to use the automations?
questions.answer: None at all. Once we build and hand over your automation, it runs completely in the background. You don't need to touch any code or manage any tools. We keep it simple.

questions.question: What tools and platforms do you use to build automations?
questions.answer: We primarily build on n8n and Make (formerly Integromat). Both are industry-leading automation platforms that can connect virtually any app. For AI-powered automations, we integrate OpenAI. The choice of platform depends on your specific needs and budget.

questions.question: What happens if an automation breaks or stops working?
questions.answer: All our automations include error handling — if something fails, you'll get a WhatsApp or email alert immediately. Every plan includes post-launch support, and our maintenance packages include ongoing monitoring and fixing.

questions.question: Can you automate something that isn't on your list?
questions.answer: Almost certainly yes. If the tools you use have an API (almost all modern apps do), we can connect them. Book a free discovery call and tell us what you need — we'll let you know if it's possible.

questions.question: How much does it cost to maintain the automation after launch?
questions.answer: Monthly maintenance is optional and starts from ৳2,000/month for Starter automations. It covers monitoring, fixing issues when connected apps update their systems, and small adjustments. You can also manage without maintenance if the automation is stable.

questions.question: Will it work with the tools I'm already using?
questions.answer: Yes. We build around your existing stack — we don't ask you to switch tools or change how you work. Whether you're using WhatsApp, Google Sheets, Facebook, WooCommerce, or anything else, we connect them together.

questions.question: How do payments work?
questions.answer: We take 50% upfront to start the build and 50% upon delivery after you've tested and approved the automation. We accept bKash, Nagad, and bank transfer.

questions.question: What if I want to add more automations later?
questions.answer: Easy. You can add individual workflows at any time. We'll scope it, quote it, and build it — typically within 3–7 days depending on complexity.

stillHaveQuestions.title: Still Have a Question?
stillHaveQuestions.subtitle: We're happy to answer anything before you commit. No pressure, just an honest conversation.

simpleCta.title: Ready to Stop Doing It Manually?
simpleCta.subtitle: Tell us the one task that wastes the most time in your day. We'll automate it — and you'll wonder how you ever lived without it.

stats.delivery: Live in as little as 48 hours

simpleCta.finalNote: 💡 Not sure what to automate? Book a free call and we'll find the biggest time-wasters in your workflow.
